items.title: Listening to Our Queer & Trans Elders
items.summary: We kick off our Pride Month series with painter Jamie Nares. Plus, a sports betting company makes its first foray into the art market.

items.title: Portrait of a Papal Artist
items.summary: In Rome, an exhibition explores Gian Lorenzo Bernini’s relationship to his most powerful patron, Pope Urban VIII.

items.title: Divination, Mark Making, Boxing, & Drawing: "Tracey Rose" at Ruby City
items.summary: Opening June 6 in San Antonio, Texas, “Tracey Rose” offers viewers an intimate look at the artist’s groundbreaking multidisciplinary practice including performance and drawings.

items.title: The Black Photographers Who Exposed My Own Brainwashing
items.summary: An exhibition at The Getty gave me the peculiar feeling of peeking behind a curtain in my own house and discovering new things about a topic I thought I knew well.
